title: Roasted Algerian Lamb
description: A flavorful and aromatic Algerian-inspired lamb dish, perfect for a romantic dinner. The combination of spices and lemon creates a unique and delicious flavor profile.
instructions: Rinse the lamb shoulder and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, romantic spice blend, lemon zest, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the lamb shoulder, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the lamb shoulder on a roasting pan and pour the lemon juice over it.
Roast the lamb in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 375°F (190°C) and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
